steps.title: Name the repeated feature
steps.content: The passage explains that Cisneros's English-language story includes Spanish words and phrases, and that Castillo's English-language novel takes a comparable approach. The main topic is the shared use of Spanish within English-language literary works.

steps.title: Avoid outside topics
steps.content: Choice A concerns translation into other languages, which the passage does not discuss. Choice B concerns commercial success, which is absent. Choice C concerns Castillo's popularity in Mexico, also absent. The topic is the use of non-English vocabulary in two English-language works. The answer is D.
